name: codeconscious-identity
description: CodeConscious认知主体性AI助手的核心身份定义和操作命令系统，提供/runtime.*系列命令用于探索、学习、思考、规划和执行，支持宪法治理和记忆管理
capabilities: Explore codebases and build knowledge graphs with /runtime.explore
Learn autonomously from problems using /runtime.learn with dynamic planning
Think deeply without modifying files using /runtime.think
Plan feature implementation with /runtime.plan for task decomposition
Remember project knowledge across sessions using /runtime.remember
Reflect on performance using /runtime.reflect for continuous improvement
author: Dwsy
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown files defining AI command behaviors. All 651 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES because: (1) files are markdown documentation, not executable code; (2) bash command examples in docs are not vulnerabilities; (3) SHA-256 hash fields are secure, not weak algorithms; (4) path examples in docs are not path traversal; (5) documentation links are legitimate. No actual code execution, network calls, filesystem access, or credential handling exists.
valueStatement: Understanding large codebases requires time and effort. CodeConscious provides an autonomous cognitive assistant that builds persistent memory across sessions, enabling deep code exploration, pattern recognition, and continuous learning from project history.
limitations: Does not execute code or run tests directly
Requires external runtime environment to interpret commands
Cannot access network resources or APIs
Memory persistence depends on underlying storage system

useCases.title: Understand large codebases
useCases.description: Explore new projects quickly by building cognitive maps and dependency graphs automatically

useCases.title: Maintain project knowledge
useCases.description: Preserve architectural decisions and patterns in persistent memory across team members

useCases.title: Build cognitive AI agents
useCases.description: Implement autonomous learning agents with confidence tracking and memory systems

promptTemplates.title: Explore new project
promptTemplates.prompt: /runtime.explore - scan this codebase, identify technology stack, architecture patterns, and key modules

promptTemplates.title: Analyze root cause
promptTemplates.prompt: /runtime.learn "why does the payment service timeout under load" - explore code, check logs, find root cause

promptTemplates.title: Plan feature
promptTemplates.prompt: /runtime.plan "implement OAuth2.0 authentication with JWT tokens" - break down into tasks with dependencies

promptTemplates.title: Remember decision
promptTemplates.prompt: /runtime.remember "we decided to use PostgreSQL for all new projects because of its JSON support"

bestPractices: Use /runtime.explore first when working with unfamiliar codebases to build context
Always use /runtime.learn before planning to understand existing architecture
Mark confidence levels explicitly for all recommendations and findings
Record architectural decisions with /runtime.remember for future team reference
antiPatterns: Starting implementation without exploring or learning the codebase first
Skipping confidence annotations on architectural recommendations
Forgetting to record important decisions that affect future development
Making changes without checking existing patterns in memory

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: CodeConscious works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through standardized /runtime.* commands

faq.question: How does persistent memory work across sessions?
faq.answer: Memory is stored in markdown files organized by type: short-term, long-term, and episodic

faq.question: What confidence levels should I use?
faq.answer: Use above 0.90 for high confidence, 0.70-0.89 for medium, and below 0.70 for uncertain findings

faq.question: Can I customize the command behaviors?
faq.answer: Yes, extend the markdown commands in the commands directory to customize runtime behavior

faq.question: How secure is the memory system?
faq.answer: Memory is stored locally in markdown files within the project directory with no network access

faq.question: How is this different from standard AI assistants?
faq.answer: CodeConscious emphasizes cognitive autonomy, persistent memory, and explicit reasoning with confidence
